title: Hastings Direct
tagLine: At Hastings Direct, I helped deliver the digital renewals journey and the new quote and buy experience, improving key customer journeys across the insurance platform.

title: Health Data Gateway
tagLine: Health Data Gateway streamlines how researchers search, discover, and request access to datasets, analysis scripts, publications, and research projects from across the UK and beyond.

title: ITVX Short Form
tagLine: I contributed to the launch and ongoing development of short-form news and sport content on ITVX, helping expand the platform's editorial video experience.

title: ITVX Regional News
tagLine: A regionalised news experience that allows users to watch content tailored to their location, making ITV News more relevant and personalised.
